message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
}

box "Platform" #BFE3EA
participant "CPO1" as CPO1
end box

participant "HUB" as HUB #E6E6F2

box "Platform" #BFE3EA
participant "MSP1" as MSP1
end box

CPO1 -> HUB : HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1\nFROM: CPO1
activate HUB
HUB -> MSP1 : HTTP: GET\nTO: MSP1\nFROM: CPO1
activate MSP1
MSP1 --> HUB : HTTP: RESPONSE\nTO: CPO1\nFROM: MSP1
deactivate MSP1
HUB --> CPO1 : HTTP: RESPONSE\nTO: CPO1\nFROM: MSP1
deactivate HUB

@enduml
